title: Health & Sciences Seminar Series
content:
## Health & Sciences Seminar Series
McCarthy Tétrault invites you to join us for a three-part series of panels exploring trending topics in the Health, Life Sciences and Pharmaceutical industries.
Wednesday, June 12th – The Changing Landscape for the Healthcare Industry : Trends to watch.
- Marc Toppings , Vice President and Chief Legal Officer, University Health Network
- Zayna Khayat , Health Futurist, Deloitte Canada and Adjunct Professor, Rotman School of Management, University of Toronto
For questions about this event, please contact clientevents@mccarthy.ca .
Each session qualifies for up to 1 hour of CPD credit under the mandatory education regimes in British Columbia and Ontario.
Barreau du Québec Continuing Education : Each session contains up to 1 hour of content. For more information regarding the declaration and recognition of educational activities, please contact the Barreau du Québec .
June 12 - 2 p.m. – 3 p.m.
Marc Toppings Zayna Khayat
- Law Society of Ontario – Substantive
- Law Society of British Columbia – Substantive
